item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Daybreak Service - 07/05/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/05/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for Daybreak Service at Trinity United Church of Christ — a peaceful 30-minute morning gathering to start your day with reflection and community. When: March 1, 2026, 8:30 AM. Where: 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH. All are welcome. #DaybreakService #TrinityUCC #TiffinOH #MorningWorship #Community
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Daybreak Service on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include reflection and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Service of the Word - 07/05/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/05/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for worship, Sunday mornings at 10:00 am. In person or online via Facebook and Youtube. (search: Trinity UCC Tiffin)
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Service of the Word on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include trinity united church of christ and worship.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/05/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/05/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include wild goose chase and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/05/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/05/2026 4:00pm EDT

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and Arts.

item.title: Make it at Home: Daisy Painting - 07/06/2026 9:30am EDT to 07/06/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to make a daisy painting beginning Monday, July 6. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to make the painting will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/julymakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Make it at Home: Daisy Painting on Jul 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include supply kits and tiffin seneca public library.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/06/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/06/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer activities.

item.title: 10:30a | Family Storytime - 07/07/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/07/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for "Family Storytime" on Tuesdays, July 7, 14, and 21 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This engaging program offers stories, songs, rhymes, and games suitable for the whole family, with no registration required. All ages are welcome as part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more details, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or check the library's website at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 10:30a | Family Storytime on Jul 7, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include all ages and engaging program.

item.title: Turning Point: The pivotal Third Day of Gettysburg - 07/07/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/07/2026 1:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Please call Allen Eiry at 419-448-9774 to sign up.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Turning Point: The pivotal Third Day of Gettysburg on Jul 7, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include gettysburg and sign up.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 07/07/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/07/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for "Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition!" at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library, happening on Tuesdays, July 7, 14, and 21 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This weekly hangout is open to teens entering grades 6 through 12 and will feature games, snacks, crafts, and more, as part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program "Unearth a Story." For more details, visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jul 7, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer edition.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 07/08/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/08/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, July 1, 8, 15, and 22 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on July 1, July 8, and July 15 with books, songs and lap bounces. On July 22, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and seasonal.

item.title: Marbled Geode Painting - 07/08/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/08/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for a creative session of "Marbled Geode Painting" on Wednesday, July 8, from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This event is designed for teens entering grades six through twelve, where participants will use marbled paint techniques along with glitter and metallic details to create their own stunning geode-inspired canvases. All materials will be provided. Registration is required, which can be completed by calling 419-447-3751 or visiting the online calendar at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For further details, contact the library at the provided number or website.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Marbled Geode Painting on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Arts and creative session.

item.title: Public Reading of the Declaration of Independence - 07/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/08/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Ohio State University Extension Seneca County as we celebrate America's 250th anniversary with a special public reading of the Declaration of Independence by Seneca County 4-H youth members. On Wednesday, July 8, 2026, communities across the United States will gather at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Time for a simultaneous reading of the Declaration of Independence, honoring the document that helped shape our nation and the ideals it continues to represent. This event commemorates a historic tradition that began in 1776. On July 4, 1776, the Second Continental Congress approved the Declaration of Independence inside the Pennsylvania State House, now known as Independence Hall. Four days later, on July 8, the citizens of Philadelphia were summoned by the ringing of the city's bells to hear the Declaration publicly read for the very first time by Colonel John Nixon. Following the reading, the bells rang throughout the city in celebration long into the night. We invite community members of all ages to join us as our local 4-H members bring these historic words to life and participate in this nationwide observance of America's 250th anniversary. Meet at the America 250 Tree and Flagpole as we gather with communities across the nation to reflect on our shared history and celebrate the ideals of liberty, independence, and civic engagement. Date: Wednesday, July 8, 2026 Time: 6:00 p.m. EDT Location: Seneca County Fairgrounds, 100 Hopewell Ave., Tiffin, OH 44883
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Public Reading of the Declaration of Independence on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include public reading of the declaration of independence and seneca county.

item.title: Public Reading of the Declaration of Independence - 07/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/08/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3140 OH-100 E, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Ohio State University Extension Seneca County as we celebrate America's 250th anniversary with a special public reading of the Declaration of Independence by Seneca County 4-H youth members. On Wednesday, July 8, 2026, communities across the United States will gather at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Time for a simultaneous reading of the Declaration of Independence, honoring the document that helped shape our nation and the ideals it continues to represent. This event commemorates a historic tradition that began in 1776. On July 4, 1776, the Second Continental Congress approved the Declaration of Independence inside the Pennsylvania State House, now known as Independence Hall. Four days later, on July 8, the citizens of Philadelphia were summoned by the ringing of the city's bells to hear the Declaration publicly read for the very first time by Colonel John Nixon. Following the reading, the bells rang throughout the city in celebration long into the night. We invite community members of all ages to join us as our local 4-H members bring these historic words to life and participate in this nationwide observance of America's 250th anniversary. Meet at the America 250 Tree and Flagpole as we gather with communities across the nation to reflect on our shared history and celebrate the ideals of liberty, independence, and civic engagement. Date: Wednesday, July 8, 2026 Time: 6:00 p.m. EDT Location: Seneca County Fairgrounds, 100 Hopewell Ave., Tiffin, OH 44883
item.dc:creator: Ohio State University Extension - Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Public Reading of the Declaration of Independence on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include liberty independence and History & Museums.

item.title: WEW Regift Bingo! - 07/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/08/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come join us for Regift Bingo at the WEW July event. Dinner and childcare is provided. Must RSVP to shallett@ncoesc.org or on FB.
item.dc:creator: Women Empowering Women - Seneca Co.
item.yodel:media_alt_text: WEW Regift Bingo! on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include women empowering women and Causes.

item.title: Level 2 Cake Decorating - 07/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/08/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Level 2 Cake Decorating class on July 8th to refine your decorating techniques and create stunning, creative designs. Enjoy a hands-on experience perfect for enhancing your skills and artistry!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Level 2 Cake Decorating on Jul 8, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include decorating techniques and hands-on experience.

item.title: "Aspen Trees" Thursday, July 9, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07092601 or #07092602 - 07/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, July 3. Paint "Aspen Trees" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, July 9 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Aspen Trees" Thursday, July 9, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07092601 or #07092602 on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include advanced painter and aspen trees.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/09/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Washington Street Outfitters
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family activities and interactive experience.

item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy the Flavors of Lebanon
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Lebanon on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and flavors of lebanon.

item.title: Downtown Trivia Night at The Knights of Columbus - America 250!! - 07/09/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 49 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Bring your American History knowledge and dress is Red, White & Blue! We are celebrating America 250!! Groups of all ages are invited to compete in two rounds of general trivia questions plus the final questions of local interest. Answers will be judged by local celebrities. Participants are asked to form teams of 6 or fewer, which can be composed of all ages. Teams will write their answers to be judged by local celebrities. Questions will be geared toward ages 12 and up. No phones, tablets, or electronic devices may be accessed during the contest. A traveling trophy will be awarded to the winning team. **ONE GrowthZone ticket per team. List each of the team members on the ticket.
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Downtown Trivia Night at The Knights of Columbus - America 250!! on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and trivia night.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 07/09/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Park & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin park recreation and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: ServSafe Manager Class - 07/10/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The ServSafe Manager course will be offered on July 10th and 17th. This class will consist of an instructor-led class with a 9th edition ServSafe manager textbook and online exam voucher included.
